news.t: Wall Street is divided on the outlook for US house prices. Here's what 6 experts have recently said.
ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
It's time to buy REITS to hedge against inflation, even though the real estate sector has struggled so far this year, says investment research firm

What it takes to make money flipping homes in a crazy real estate market

overview.description: The ProShares Short Real Estate (REK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Real Estate Select Sector index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of large US real estate companies, including REITs. REK was launched on Mar 18, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
